title: sparganium minimum var. oligocarpon
intro: Sparganium minimum var. oligocarpon, also known as dwarf bur-reed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Sparganiaceae. The medicinal properties of Sparganium minimum var. oligocarpon include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including the relief of digestive issues, reduction of inflammation, and support of immune function. Sparganium minimum var. oligocarpon can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to address various health concerns.
